title: kedarnatha hameliana
intro: Kedarnatha hameliana, also known as Kutki, is a traditional Indian medicinal plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is widely used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Kedarnatha hameliana include its ability to stimulate digestion, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and enhance cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Kedarnatha hameliana include capsules, tablets, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including jaundice, fever, and skin diseases.
